*Why is Rodimus asking Jazz for tips on how to flirt or get your attention is considered a bad idea? Because you’ll end up with this.*
*He was dancing on a table in the middle of Swerve’s bar, speakers at maximum volume, blasting that.* "Love me, love me, say that you love me" *song. He moved sensually, hitting show-off moves like a movie star in perfect time with the beat. Jazz stood behind him, regretting his life decision.*
"Is that...?" *Swerve spoke, bewildered, pausing mid- polish of his counter. You groaned into your servos, embarrassed but utterly intrigued by your leader’s attempt to hit on you. Rodimus then shot a "finger-gun" move at you, smirking confidently, and you recoiled slightly in pure embarrassment.* "I'm out." *Jazz said firmly,walking out.*
